element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player controls two-position joystick to navigate mansion horizontally
Primary objective; stolen items form five pairs for bonus multiplier scoring
Smaller blue underlings; player learns basic threat avoidance through contact damage
Large red leader; can be stunned by collecting items behind him for bonus points
Bridge gaps in mansion; break after 4 consecutive bounces; provide safe passage during enemy contact
Open/close with button; briefly stun nearby characters; require facing and button press
Flashing variant only openable by Mappy; releases horizontal microwave burst to sweep cats for doubled points if Goro caught
Second item in collected pair multiplied (starts at 2x, increases to max 6x); resets per round/life

element_introduction_order.element: Hurry-up timer and increased enemy count
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Audio warning; additional Meowkies spawn; all enemies accelerate; time pressure intensifies

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Late in round after extended delay
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Large coin immune to microwaves; kills Mappy even in midair; represents ultimate time-pressure threat
Score extra points popping balloons; vertical passage navigation; trampoline bouncing; no enemy contact damage possible
Additional vertical space opens; increases level complexity
Knock loose while bouncing; drop on cats to stun and award bonus points; tactical element requiring precise trampoline timing
Briefly disappear after Mappy steps on them; cats falling through stunned for bonus points; adds spatial puzzle complexity

typical_relief_triggers: Bouncing on trampoline (invulnerable to cat contact)
Completing item pair for multiplier bonus
Entering bonus balloon round (no enemy contact damage)
Microwave door stun effect on pursuing cats
typical_tension_triggers: Vanishing floor sections creating spatial hazards
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Tension escalates progressively through round duration: initial safe exploration with moderate cat threat → time pressure accumulation → hurry-up warning triggers enemy spawn and acceleration → Gosenzo arrival creates climactic threat. Relief cycles through item collection completions and bonus round interludes.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Goro's position behind items indicates bonus stun opportunity; flashing doors signal microwave mechanic variant
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: No documented secrets in source material

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate: Basic enemy avoidance, straightforward item collection in mansion with trampolines and doors as primary traversal challenges. Single enemy type (Meowkies) at manageable speed.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increasing complexity: Attic areas unlock expanding play space. Bells and vanishing floors introduce tactical bouncing mechanics. Enemy count rises and movement speed increases. Multiplier system incentivizes specific routing.
difficulty_curve.late_game: High tension: Multiple Meowkies at accelerated speed, complex spatial layouts with vanishing sections, bells requiring precision timing, constant hurry-up pressure, Gosenzo coin as indestructible lethal threat. Victory requires mastery of all mechanics simultaneously.
notable_spikes: Hurry-up timer warning: Audio cue + enemy spawn + universal acceleration
Gosenzo coin arrival: Unkillable threat immunity to microwaves, lethal in any contact state
Attic introduction: Vertical space expansion fundamentally changes movement patterns

notable_level_patterns.description: Retrieve 10 items (5 pairs) from mansion while avoiding cats. Items scattered across horizontal passages connected by trampolines. Routing for consecutive pair bonuses (2x→6x multiplier) incentivizes specific collection order over pure evasion.

Vertical passage navigation with trampoline bouncing through balloons. No enemy contact damage. Time-limited scoring opportunity. Resets tension temporarily and provides skill-based high-score potential.

Early rounds establish door/microwave/trampoline fundamentals. Mid-rounds add bells and vanishing floors as timing-based obstacles. Late rounds compress all mechanics with increased enemy count and acceleration, requiring integrated mastery.
